title: abutilon × milleri
intro: Abutilon × milleri, also known as the hybrid abutilon or flowering maple, is a genus of flowering plants in the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is a hybrid of Abutilon hybridum and Abutilon megapotamicum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and leaves are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Abutilon × milleri include its ability to help manage fever, reduce inflammation, and treat gastrointestinal problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Abutilon × milleri can be prepared as herbal tea, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical applications, showcasing its versatility and potential in modern medicine.
